title: Animal Garden - Common Raven
description: This mod adds the Common Raven as a mob to your world.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EzyL5Shd/images/002fb64cda5e7ab6fffc554016b3a1d0fbfcfe27.gif) 

This mod adds the Common Raven as a mob to your world.


They will steal items from the ground and will drop them off after a while.
If they "kraa" 4 times it means it found an item that it wants to pick up.
If the raven is tamed then it will drop the item off to the player and you can make it sit down.
If its not tamed or is in wandering mode then it will drop them off after a while near a hopper if possible.
And any player can take away its item when clicked on it even if its untamed.

 

They are weak, but they still fight back and protects their owner.

 

They have 3 behavior mode, that can be changed by simply clicking on them after tamed
and it will "kraa" at you when switching behavior modes, to let you know which command you gave it, only if you dont spam this!

(1 kraa)Wander mode: when its just randomly wandering around and steal items from the ground and drops them off later. (on a hopper if there is one near to it)

(2 kraa)Follow mode: when it will follow the owner and if there is an item near then it will go and pick it up and give it to the player.

(3 kraa)Sitting mode: where it will just sit down and wait for you there until you switch its mode again.


There is a 10% chance that a Raven spawns with albinism or with leucism,
because of that it will have white or gray feathers and eyes with different colors such as pink, red, white, blue, gray, brown, yellow.
Dark colored ravens can spawn with only white, blue, brown, gray or black colored eyes.


You can find them in forest biomes and they can eat any food item and seeds.

When tamed their default 6 hp will increase to 16 and their attack damage from 3 to 4.

You can heal, breed and tame them with these items.

 

(In forge and neoforge you can change the spawn settings by editing the json files in the data -> biome tags and biome modifier folders or via resource pack and in fabric there is a config file for it)

 

Mod currently supports

**Forge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Fabric 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1 | 1.20.1**

**Neoforge 26.1.x | 1.21.11 | 1.21.10 | 1.21.9 | 1.21.8 | 1.21.7 | 1.21.6 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.1**

 

Credits:
Cornell Lab of Ornithology
